---
name: Docs issue
about: Report a problem in the README, docs site, or package readmes
---

# Summary

Describe the docs problem in 2-5 sentences.

## Affected Page

Link the page or name the file.

## Problem

What is wrong, unclear, stale, or missing?

## Suggested Fix

What should the page say instead?

## Additional Context

Add any examples or screenshots if helpful.
